laws.title: Onboarding Experience
laws.description: Streamline the onboarding process to reduce friction for new users.
laws.remediation: Simplify account creation steps and provide guidance through tooltips.

laws.title: Navigation Intuitiveness
laws.description: Review navigation structure for ease of use and ensure quick access to vital features.
laws.remediation: Conduct user testing to identify pain points and simplify the navigation hierarchy.

laws.title: Notification Management
laws.description: Users need a centralized place to manage notification settings effectively.
laws.remediation: Consolidate notification settings into a single, accessible section.

laws.title: Search Functionality
laws.description: Improve the search tool to deliver faster and more relevant results.
laws.remediation: Implement AI-driven search suggestions and filters to enhance search accuracy.

laws.title: User Feedback Mechanism
laws.description: Facilitate an easy way to collect user feedback to continually improve UX.
laws.remediation: Place feedback options prominently and reduce the number of steps to submit feedback.
